settings.title: Autumn Family Sessions Are Open Early This Year
settings.excerpt: We are opening the fall calendar now because the warm light weekends always book first.
settings.body:
The best family photos of the year happen in a short window, when the leaves turn and the light goes soft and gold in the afternoons.

That window is also the busiest stretch on our calendar, so we are opening autumn bookings early. Sessions run from late September through the first weekend of November.

Why autumn light is worth chasing

For a few weeks the sun sits low for most of the afternoon, so you get that warm, flattering light for hours instead of a single rushed half hour. The turning leaves add colour without anyone needing to plan an outfit around it. It is the easiest light we shoot in all year.

A few small things make an autumn session go smoothly.

  • Layers, so a chilly start does not end the shoot early.
  • Closed shoes for the kids, since the meadow gets damp.
  • A loose plan, and room for the weather to change it.

If you have a holiday card in mind, book toward the early end. It leaves room to reshoot if the weather turns, which in October it sometimes does.

How the calendar fills

The warm light weekends always go first, usually the Saturdays in early October. Weekday sessions stay open longer and are quieter, which can be lovely with small children who fade by the weekend.

Send us a rough idea of when works and how many of you there will be. We will hold a slot and sort the exact afternoon closer to the day, once we can see how the light is behaving.
